# docpick

> Document in, Structured JSON out. Schema-driven document extraction with local OCR + LLM.

## Purpose

Extracts structured data from documents (PDF, images) using a local OCR + LLM pipeline. Define a schema (built-in or custom JSON), and docpick runs OCR to read the document, then sends the text to a local LLM to extract fields matching your schema. All processing runs locally via PaddleOCR/EasyOCR and vLLM/Ollama.

## Capabilities

- **Schema-driven extraction**: Built-in schemas for invoice, receipt, bill of lading, purchase order, kr_tax_invoice, bank_statement, id_document, certificate_of_origin; or provide a custom JSON schema
- **Multiple OCR engines**: PaddleOCR (default), EasyOCR, GOT-OCR2.0 -- all optional extras
- **Local LLM extraction**: Sends OCR text to vLLM or Ollama for structured field extraction
- **Validation**: Schema-based validation with typed errors and warnings
- **Batch processing**: Process entire directories with configurable concurrency
- **OCR-only mode**: Run OCR without LLM extraction for raw text output
- **VLM mode**: Direct vision-language model extraction (skip OCR step)

## Installation

```
pip install docpick
pip install docpick[paddle]   # + PaddleOCR
pip install docpick[easyocr]  # + EasyOCR
pip install docpick[mcp]      # + MCP server
pip install docpick[all]      # everything
```

## Quick Use

### CLI

```bash
docpick extract invoice.pdf --schema invoice
docpick extract receipt.jpg --schema receipt --ocr paddle --output result.json
docpick ocr document.pdf --format markdown
docpick batch ./documents/ --schema invoice --output ./results/ --concurrency 4
docpick schemas list
docpick schemas show invoice
docpick validate result.json --schema invoice
docpick config show
```

### Python

```python
from docpick import DocpickPipeline, DocpickConfig

pipeline = DocpickPipeline(DocpickConfig.load())
result = pipeline.extract("invoice.pdf", schema=InvoiceSchema, mode="auto")
print(result.to_json(pretty=True))
```

### MCP

Server: `docpick` (command: `docpick-mcp`)
Tools: `extract_document`, `ocr_document`, `list_schemas`

## Links

- Docs: https://github.com/QuartzUnit/docpick
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/docpick/
- Source: https://github.com/QuartzUnit/docpick
